product.name: TODO Headlight Assembly Compatible with Hyundai Elantra Passenger RH 2014-2016 Right Side USA-BUILT
product.description: TODO headlight assembly Compatible with 2014-2016 Hyundai Elantra Replacement Compatibility : SE/Value Edition.  Not compatible with Sport/Limited/GT Not for vehicle with daytime running lights Specification High Beam:H7/12V/55W Low Beam:HB3/12V/55W Turn Signal:PY21W Indicator Light: LED ⚠️ ATTENTION: TWO VERSIONS AVAILABLE This item (OE# 92101-3Y500, 6-pin) is precision-designed for USA-BUILT  Elantra models (Check your VIN: it should start with '1' or '5'). Why this matters: If your VIN starts with 'K' (Korea-Built), you may find the mounting holes are off by about 1/4 inch. To ensure a 100% Perfect Fit, please confirm your vehicle's origin before ordering!
features: Replacement for 2016 Elantra Value Edition; For 2014 2015 2016 Elantra (Submodel: GL, GLS, L, Limited, SE, Sport).
Package: passenger side headlight. H7+H11 Bulbs, bulbs are not included. with LED Side Marker Light.
Meet DOT & SAE Standards. There is no installation instructions, and it is best to install it by a professional.
Compatible on Right Passenger Side Only.
